query:
SELECT id, claim_number, claimant_name 
FROM claims 
WHERE damage_photos IS NOT NULL 
  AND damage_photos != '[]'
  AND id NOT IN (
    SELECT claim_id FROM ai_assessments
  )
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 20;
